tasks.question: What is the competition stage, round, and importance of this match?
Who is the referee and what is the officiating profile for this match?
Are there injuries, suspensions, or important absences for both teams?
What are the expected starting lineups and rotation risks?
What is the recent form (last 5 matches) of both teams?
What is the head-to-head history between the teams?
What is the travel load and location impact for both teams?
What does the current model/value layer indicate for this match?

summary.el: Dziugas Telsiai - Banga: ανάλυση με βάση ιστορικά και διαθέσιμα δεδομένα. Dziugas Telsiai: 1-3-1 στα τελευταία 5. Banga: 4-1-0 στα τελευταία 5. Η πρόσφατη φόρμα δίνει ελαφρύ προβάδισμα στους φιλοξενούμενους. Το historical layer βασίστηκε σε 916 διαθέσιμες εγγραφές αγώνων. Στα τελευταία 5 μεταξύ τους: Dziugas Telsiai 2 νίκες, ισοπαλίες 1, Banga 2 νίκες. Το H2H είναι σχετικά ισορροπημένο. Το H2H δείχνει τάση για πιο κλειστά παιχνίδια. Βαθμολογικό context: Dziugas Telsiai=title, Banga=title. Απουσίες: Dziugas Telsiai=severe, Banga=severe. Lineup context: Dziugas Telsiai=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:reduced; Banga=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:reduced. Υπάρχει διαθέσιμο team news context στο enriched snapshot. Υπάρχει διαθέσιμο lineup context στο enriched snapshot.
summary.en: Dziugas Telsiai vs Banga: contextual analysis using historical and available data. Dziugas Telsiai: 1-3-1 across the last 5. Banga: 4-1-0 across the last 5. Recent form gives a slight edge to the away side. The historical layer was based on 916 available match records. Across the last 5 head-to-head meetings: Dziugas Telsiai 2 wins, draws 1, Banga 2 wins. The head-to-head profile is relatively balanced. The head-to-head profile points toward tighter games. Table context: Dziugas Telsiai=title, Banga=title. Absences: Dziugas Telsiai=severe, Banga=severe. Lineup context: Dziugas Telsiai=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:reduced; Banga=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:reduced. Team news context is available in the enriched snapshot. Lineup context is available in the enriched snapshot.
